workflow.name: Sell products in Telegram with Paystack and Google Sheets
workflow.description:
## 🚀 Overview
Transform your Telegram channel or group into a fully functional, automated e-commerce storefront. This n8n workflow template allows you to sell both physical and digital products directly within Telegram, utilizing **Paystack** for secure checkout and **Google Sheets** as a lightweight, free database for inventory and order management.

Say goodbye to complex website builders and monthly subscription fees. With this serverless setup, you can launch a store in minutes and manage everything from a simple spreadsheet.

## ✨ Key Features
* **🛒 Interactive Shopping Cart:** Users can browse products, select quantities, and manage their cart entirely through seamless Telegram inline buttons.
* **💳 Secure Payments:** Direct integration with the Paystack API generates unique, secure checkout links for every order.
* **📦 Smart Fulfillment:** Automatically detects if an order is digital or physical. Digital goods (e.g., PDFs, E-books via Google Drive) are delivered instantly upon payment confirmation. Physical orders are marked as "Paid" and queued for shipping.
* **📊 Free Database (Google Sheets):** No SQL required! Manage your product catalog, track active user sessions, and view order history entirely within Google Sheets.
* **🔍 Order Tracking System:** Customers can use the `/orders` command or search by their unique `ORD-` ID to view their purchase history, resume pending payments, or track shipped items.
* **⚙️ Built-in Validation:** Includes robust data validation for email addresses (catching common typos like `.con`) and physical delivery addresses.

## 🛠 Prerequisites
To run this template, you will need the following accounts:
1. **[Telegram](https://telegram.org/):** A free Telegram Bot Token (obtained via BotFather).
2. **[Paystack](https://paystack.com/):** A Paystack account to receive payments (you will need your Secret Key).
3. **[Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/):** A Google account to host the Google Sheets database and Google Drive (if selling digital files).

## 📝 Setup Instructions

### 1. Database Setup
1. Create a new Google Sheet (Template; [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1x58FYmsdo2K2dKNm81LgCSrGvHwhenkJTtjDIxc8-2w/edit?gid=187299608#gid=187299608](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1x58FYmsdo2K2dKNm81LgCSrGvHwhenkJTtjDIxc8-2w/edit?gid=187299608#gid=187299608) with three tabs: `Products`, `Orders`, and `Session`.
2. **Products Tab Headers:** `id`, `name`, `price`, `type` (physical/digital), `stock`, `description`, `file_url` (optional, for digital goods).
3. **Orders Tab Headers:** `order_id`, `reference`, `user_id`, `email`, `address`, `items_json`, `total`, `status`, `payment_link`, `tracking`, `created_at`.
4. **Session Tab Headers:** `user_id`, `chat_id`, `state`, `cart_json`, `selected_product_id`, `selected_product_name`, `selected_product_price`, `selected_product_type`, `input_quantity`, `input_email`, `input_address`.

### 2. n8n Node Configuration
1. Import this template into your n8n workspace.
2. Update the **Google Sheets** credentials and replace the `Document ID` in all sheet nodes with your specific spreadsheet ID.
3. Add your Telegram Bot Token via n8n's credential manager to activate the **Telegram Trigger** and messaging nodes.
4. Locate the nodes containing the `YOUR_PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY` placeholder (e.g., `Paystack Init Transaction`) and insert your actual Paystack Secret Key.

### 3. Webhook Activation
1. Double-click the **Paystack Webhook** node.
2. Copy the "Production URL" provided by n8n.
3. Log into your Paystack Dashboard, navigate to **Settings > Webhooks**, and paste the URL. This ensures your bot receives real-time payment confirmations.

## 💡 Use Cases
* **Digital Creators:** Sell e-books, courses, templates, or software directly to your Telegram audience with instant file delivery.
* **Local Businesses:** Automate orders for physical goods, food delivery, or merchandise without needing a dedicated website.
* **Dropshipping:** Seamlessly collect orders and addresses before forwarding them to suppliers.

## 🔗 Apps Integrated
* Telegram
* Paystack
* Google Sheets
* Google Drive (Optional)

**You can also test the workflow live on Telegram: @sellvia_paystack_bot or [https://t.me/sellvia_paystack_bot](https://t.me/sellvia_paystack_bot))**
---
## 👋 Need help or want to customize this workflow?

📺 Contact: [Fiverr](https://www.fiverr.com/sampdiablog/)
📩 Consultation: [Book Appointment](https://calendly.com/oghenekaroafigo/meeting)

workflow.name: Automate Products Sales with Paystack and Telegram

parameters.text:
=👋 Welcome, {{ $('🔄 Extract Telegram Data').item.json.first_name }}!

Welcome to our store. What would you like to do?

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.text, parse_mode: 'HTML', reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } }) }}

parameters.text: =🛍️ {{ $('📦 Get Product Detail').item.json.name }} 💰 Price: ₦{{ Number($('📦 Get Product Detail').item.json.price).toLocaleString() }} 📦 In stock: {{ $('📦 Get Product Detail').item.json.stock }} units How many would you like? (Reply with a number) Type /cancel to go back
=😔 Sorry, {{ $json.name }} is currently out of stock. We'll restock soon! Check back later.
=❌ Sorry, only {{ $json.stock }} unit(s) of this product are available. Please enter a lower quantity.

🛒 Your cart is empty!

Browse our products and add something you like.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.text, parse_mode: 'HTML', reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } }) }}

parameters.text: =🗑️ Removed {{ $('🗑️ Remove Item from Cart').item.json.removed_name }} from your cart. {{ $('🗑️ Remove Item from Cart').item.json.cart_count > 0 ? 'Cart updated! ✅' : 'Your cart is now empty.' }}

={{ $json.state === 'idle' ? '❌ Your cart is empty! Please add items to your cart before checking out. Send /start to go to the main menu.' : '💳 Checkout Please enter your email address to receive your payment confirmation: Type /cancel to go back' }}
📦 Delivery Address Your cart includes physical items. Please enter your full delivery address: Type /cancel to go back
❌ Please enter a complete delivery address (street, city, state):

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ email: $('📋 Prepare Order Data').item.json.email, amount: $('📋 Prepare Order Data').item.json.total_kobo, reference: $('📋 Prepare Order Data').item.json.reference, metadata: { user_id: $('📋 Prepare Order Data').item.json.user_id, order_id: $('📋 Prepare Order Data').item.json.order_id, chat_id: $('📋 Prepare Order Data').item.json.chat_id } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('📋 Prepare Order Data').item.json.chat_id, text: '💳 Processing Payment... 📋 Order: ' + $('📋 Prepare Order Data').item.json.order_id + ' 💰 Total: ₦' + Number($('📋 Prepare Order Data').item.json.total).toLocaleString() + ' Click the button below to complete your payment securely:', parse_mode: 'HTML', reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: [[{ text: '💳 Pay Now', url: $('💳 Paystack Init Transaction').item.json.data.authorization_url }]] } }) }}

parameters.text: =✅ Order Delivered! 📦 {{ $json.name }} 🔑 Here is your digital download. Tap the button below to download your file. Thank you for your purchase! 🎉
=✅ Order Confirmed! 📦 {{ $json.name }} (× {{ $json.quantity }}) is being prepared for delivery. 🚚 Shipping to: {{ $json.address }} Click on order for tracking update. Thank you! 🎉

value.stock: ={{ Math.max(0, Number($json.stock) - Number($('📦 Parse Order Items').item.json.quantity)) }}

conditions.leftValue: ={{ Math.max(0, Number($('📉 Update Product Stock').item.json.stock) - Number($('📦 Parse Order Items').item.json.quantity)) }}

value.user_id: ={{ $('📋 Find Order by Reference').item.json.user_id || $('🔐 Verify Paystack Signature').item.json.metadata.user_id }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.text, parse_mode: 'HTML', reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.text, parse_mode: 'HTML', reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } }) }}

parameters.text: 🔍 Please type your Order ID to search: Example: ORD-1777329910906-2048334808 Type /cancel to go back
❌ Invalid Order ID format. Please enter a valid Order ID starting with ORD- Example: ORD-1777329910906-2048334808

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.text, parse_mode: 'HTML', reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.text, parse_mode: 'HTML', reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } }) }}

parameters.content:
## 🛒 Automate Products Sales with Paystack and Telegram

This workflow creates a complete, serverless e-commerce storefront within Telegram. It manages product catalogs, shopping carts, secure Paystack checkout, and automated digital/physical delivery tracking entirely through Google Sheets as a database.

### ⚙️ Setup & Customization Steps
Before activating this workflow, please configure the following credentials and settings:

1. **Telegram Bot Token:** Add your Telegram API credentials in the `Telegram Trigger` and all Telegram messaging nodes.
2. **Google Sheets Integration:** Connect your Google account and ensure the `Orders`, `Products`, and `Session` sheets have the correct column headers. Update the `Document ID` in all Google Sheets nodes to match your sheet.
3. **Paystack Credentials:** Insert your Paystack Secret Key into the `Paystack Init Transaction` and `Verify Payment` HTTP Request nodes.
4. **Webhook URL Configuration:** Update your Paystack dashboard with the Production URL generated by the `Paystack Webhook` node.
5. **Google Drive (Optional):** If selling digital products, ensure the `file_url` column in your Products sheet contains valid, publicly accessible Google Drive links.

### 1️⃣ Telegram Webhook & Command Routing
**Suggested Color:** Yellow / Default
**Nodes Covered:** `Telegram Trigger`, `Extract Telegram Data`, `Route Callback Data`, `Welcome Message`

###   3️⃣  Product Catalog & Cart Management, Checkout Flow & User Data Validation,   Order Creation & Paystack Integration, Webhook Callback & Order Fulfillment, and User Order History & Tracking
*Nodes Covered:** `Checkout Check Cart`, `Ask for Email`, `Validate Email Input`, `Ask for Address`, `Validate & Save Address`, Prepare Order Data`, `Create Order in Sheets`, `Paystack Init Transaction`, `Save Payment Link`, `Send Payment Link`, Paystack Webhook`, `Verify Payment`, `Find Order by Reference`, `Update Order: Paid`, `Format Digital Delivery`, `Update Order: Delivered`, `Send Shipping Confirmation`
,  Fetch User Orders`, `Format Orders List`, `Ask Order ID`, `Validate Order Search`, `Format Searched Order`, `Format Order Detail`.

## 🤖 Telegram Bot Entry Point & Routing
This section handles all incoming interactions from Telegram users. It serves as the primary router for the e-commerce bot.

* **Webhook Listener:** Captures user messages, commands (`/start`, `/orders`), and inline button clicks.
* **Data Extraction:** Normalizes payloads into a consistent `chat_id` and `user_id` structure.
* **Intelligent Routing:** Directs users to the correct workflow path (catalog, cart, checkout, or orders) based on their input.

## 📝 Checkout & Data Validation Flow

Collects and validates essential customer information required for payment and delivery before order creation.

* **Email Collection:** Prompts for email and validates format (detecting common TLD typos like `.con`).
* **Conditional Address Prompt:** Only asks for a physical delivery address if the cart contains physical items.
* **State Management:** Updates the `Session` sheet to track the user's progress through the checkout steps.

## 💳 Paystack Payment Initialization
Commits the finalized cart to the database and generates a secure payment gateway link via the Paystack API.

* **Order Generation:** Creates a unique `ORD-` ID and saves the pending order to Google Sheets.
* **Payment API:** Calls Paystack to initialize the transaction using the validated customer email and total amount.
* **Link Storage:** Saves the `authorization_url` back to the database for later retrieval (e.g., resuming pending orders).
* **Payment Prompt:** Sends the user an inline "Pay Now" button to complete the transaction securely.

## 📦🛒 Telegram Bot Entry Point & Routing
Customer Order History & Tracking
Provides users with a self-service portal to view past orders, resume payments, and track shipments within Telegram.

* **Order History:** Retrieves the 5 most recent orders associated with the user's Telegram ID.
* **Smart UI:** Displays context-aware buttons (e.g., "Pay Now" for pending, "Download" for digital, "Track" for physical).
* **Search Functionality:** Allows users to find specific orders using their `ORD-` tracking number with built-in validation and cancellation.

## 🤖 Telegram Bot Entry Point & Routing
This section handles all incoming interactions from Telegram users. It serves as the primary router for the e-commerce bot.

* **Webhook Listener:** Captures user messages, commands (`/start`, `/orders`), and inline button clicks.
* **Data Extraction:** Normalizes payloads into a consistent `chat_id` and `user_id` structure.
* **Intelligent Routing:** Directs users to the correct workflow path (catalog, cart, checkout, or orders) based on their input.

⚠️ Replace  "YOUR_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" with your telegram bot token in the URL field of the following HTTP Request nodes: 📤 Send Products List, 🛒 Send Cart Display, 📤 Send Orders List, 📤 Send Order Detail, and 📤 Send Track Info.
⚠️ Replace  "YOUR_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" with your telegram bot token in the URL field of the following HTTP Request node: 📤 Send Payment Link
⚠️ Replace  "YOUR_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" with your telegram bot token in the URL field of the following HTTP Request node: 📤 Send Payment Link
⚠️ Replace  "YOUR_PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY" with your paystack live or test Secret Key in the Authorization Header of the following node:: 💳 Paystack Init Transaction

user.name: Afigo Sam
user.bio: Helping businesses scale through automation and custom web/mobile apps. 6+ years of expertise. Available for projects and 1-on-1 video consultations.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
